content: Kaplay install (official docs, v3001.0.19): global script tag <script src=kaplay.js> exposes kaplay(); ESM import kaplay from kaplay.mjs. Both work offline when files are vendored locally. CRITICAL: file:// fails for ESM modules and most asset (image) fetches due to browser CORS/module security; must serve via local static HTTP server (python3 -m http.server / npx http-server). Global script-tag build with images can also hit file:// canvas/CORS issues, so a static server is the reliable path regardless.
